Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 17 

CLM_BPRVDR_CITY_NAME 

LABEL: Billing Provider Address — City 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the billing provider city name, as submitted on the encounter. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_BPRVDR_CITY_NAME 

LONG NAME: CLM_BPRVDR_CITY_NAME 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 30 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: —
